summary: Cincinnati mortality dataset with total deaths by cause of death, year, and neighborhood.
Premature death disparities by neighborhood in Cincinnati, with cause of death, excess years of life lost, and year group.
Cincinnati residential tax abatement records with HERS scores, renovation/addition flags, LEED status, and approval dates.
Cincinnati COVID-19 daily response reports with updates on city services, department staffing, events, and policy changes.
Cincinnati incident/case records with case number, event date, report type, address, neighborhood, and CAD number.
Greater Cincinnati Water Works (GCWW) private-side lead service line replacement records with material types, plumber, replacement date, and status.
Cincinnati archived construction, supplies, and services contract awards from 2013-2015 with contractor, contract details, and bid tabs.
Cincinnati community council information with meeting dates, location, address, president, election month, and contact email.
Cincinnati housing unit activity by address and neighborhood, tracking units added, removed, and demolished.
Cincinnati Emergency Communications Center (ECC) protocol study data with dispatch times, incident IDs, determinants, and neighborhoods.
